## 1. Executive Summary
- **Statistics:** 0 completed, 1 pending.
- **Key Achievements:** N/A.
- **Risks:** Critical risk of service interruption due to SSL certificate expiration on 04-05. External communication has stalled.

## 2. Pending & Risks
| Date | Pending Task | Requester | Assignee | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| 03-25 | Certificate Renewal (Exp. 04-05) | Minjun Lee (Int) | David Kim (Ext) | Critical Delay |

## 3. Management Gap
- [Target] David Kim (External) - Non-responsive after two follow-ups regarding a time-sensitive renewal. Recommend immediate escalation to higher management or alternative vendor assessment to prevent expiration.

## 4. Strategic Insights
Establish a mandatory 30-day lead time for certificate renewals and maintain secondary contact points for all critical external vendors to mitigate individual non-responsiveness.
